title: 'No to war’: Spain PM hits back at Trump threat to cut trade over air base dispute
summary_full: His comments come after the U.S. president pledged to cut off all trade with Madrid over its position on the Iran conflict.
summary_public: His comments come after the U.S. president pledged to cut off all trade with Madrid over its position on the Iran conflict.
